title: real project session definition
goal: 小さい実案件1本を選び、オーケストレーターで安全に通せる session.json と acceptance.yaml を定義する
constraints: must choose a small real task
must define acceptance criteria that can be verified
manual acceptance is allowed for target selection
allowed_changes_detail: docs/sessions/*: real project session definition only
docs/acceptance/*: real project acceptance definition only
docs/reports/*: target selection memo only if strictly required
